Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "PARAASSAULTCOURSE-9300-8000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $9300 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Para Assault Course.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9300 which copies 512 bytes of data from $9320 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $8000 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $91CD. However the true start address is $8000.
